name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Prefetch File Deletion
notes:
This Building Block detects the deletion of a prefetch file.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Cedric MAURUGEON
SIGMA Title: Prefetch File Deleted
SIGMA Description: Detects the deletion of a prefetch file which may indicate an attempt to destroy forensic evidence


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Prefetch File Deletion on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Deleted
when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of pf
when the event matches File Directory (custom) is any of C:\Windows\Prefetch\%
when the event matches ("Process File File Path"='C:\windows\system32\svchost.exe' AND (LOWER("Username") LIKE '%authori%' or LOWER("Username") LIKE '%autori%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Prefetch File Deletion on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Deleted
AND when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of pf
AND when the event matches File Directory (custom) is any of C:\Windows\Prefetch\%
AND when the event matches ("Process File File Path"='C:\windows\system32\svchost.exe' AND (LOWER("Username") LIKE '%authori%' or LOWER("Username") LIKE '%autori%')) AQL filter query
